mapper.select: SELECT * FROM gl_balance WHERE period_code = CONCAT(#{year}, LPAD(#{period}, 2, '0')) ORDER BY subject_code

SELECT s.category_code AS category, SUM(b.opening_debit - b.opening_credit) AS opening_balance, SUM(b.period_debit) AS period_debit, SUM(b.period_credit) AS period_credit, SUM(b.ending_debit - b.ending_credit) AS ending_balance FROM gl_balance b INNER JOIN gl_account_subject s ON b.subject_code = s.subject_code AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE b.period_code = CONCAT(#{year}, LPAD(#{period}, 2, '0')) GROUP BY s.category_code

SELECT s.subject_code AS subjectCode, s.subject_name AS subjectName, s.category_code AS categoryCode, c.category_name AS categoryName, s.balance_direction AS balanceDirection, COALESCE(b.opening_debit, 0) AS openingDebit, COALESCE(b.opening_credit, 0) AS openingCredit, COALESCE(b.ending_debit, 0) AS endingDebit, COALESCE(b.ending_credit, 0) AS endingCredit FROM gl_account_subject s INNER JOIN gl_account_category c ON s.category_code = c.category_code AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN gl_balance b ON b.subject_code = s.subject_code AND b.period_code = CONCAT(#{year}, LPAD(#{period}, 2, '0')) WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.is_leaf = 1 AND s.category_code IN ('ASSET', 'LIAB', 'EQUITY') ORDER BY s.category_code, s.subject_code
